groups.titleZh: COPR 模拟考试（600题中随机50题）
groups.descriptionEn: Expanded PCP written exam mock bank. Each start draws a random 50-question exam from a 600-question COPR-style bank.
groups.descriptionZh: 加厚后的 PCP written exam 模拟题库。每次开始都会从 600 题 COPR 风格题库中随机抽 50 题。

questions.questionEn: A 63-year-old patient is found on a couch with snoring respirations and emesis on the shirt. Which finding most strongly suggests that airway protection is failing?
questions.questionZh: 一名 63 岁病人被发现躺在沙发上，出现打鼾样呼吸，衣服上有呕吐物。哪项发现最提示气道保护正在失败？

options.zh: 能体现灌注、通气或反应性恶化，而不是表面细节的发现
options.en: A finding that shows worsening perfusion, ventilation, or responsiveness rather than a superficial detail

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

questions.explanationEn: This item is written to feel closer to a real entry-to-practice written exam stem. The correct answer is the safest PCP-level choice because it focuses on the main threat in this case, respects the patient trend, and avoids common exam traps such as delay, distraction, and false reassurance.
questions.explanationZh: 这题被改成更接近真实 entry-to-practice written exam 题干的风格。正确答案之所以正确，是因为它把注意力放在这个病例里的主要威胁、病人趋势和最安全的 PCP 级判断上，同时避开了常见考试陷阱：拖延、被干扰项带走，以及虚假安心。

questions.questionEn: A PCP is assessing a 19-year-old patient who is wheezing with rising anxiety and a slower response to questions. What is the best immediate priority?
questions.questionZh: PCP 正在评估一名 19 岁、喘鸣加重、焦虑上升，回答问题变慢的病人。当前最好的立即优先处理是什么？

options.zh: 先处理主要即时威胁，再处理次要细节
options.en: Address the major immediate threat before secondary details

options.zh: 因为某一个征象看起来安心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

questions.explanationEn: This item is written to feel closer to a real entry-to-practice written exam stem. The correct answer is the safest PCP-level choice because it focuses on the main threat in this case, respects the patient trend, and avoids common exam traps such as delay, distraction, and false reassurance.

questions.questionEn: During management of a 76-year-old patient who is near-syncope with poor color and decreasing tolerance for movement, which next action best reflects safe PCP-level care?
questions.questionZh: 在处理一名 76 岁、接近晕厥，脸色差，且对移动越来越难耐受的病人时，哪一个下一步最符合安全的 PCP 级 care？

options.zh: 采取能回应真实威胁的最安全 PCP 级下一步
options.en: Take the safest PCP-level next step that responds to the real threat

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain

questions.explanationEn: This item is written to feel closer to a real entry-to-practice written exam stem. options.zh: 意识、灌注或呼吸努力恶化
options.en: Worsening mental status, perfusion, or breathing effort

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案
options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素

questions.questionZh: 两个病人都可能看起来令人担忧，但对于一名 31 岁、外观看起来不算夸张，但循环正在恶化的病人，哪条线索最能指向更危险的表现？

options.zh: 显示某位病人代偿或储备更差的线索
options.en: The clue showing one patient has poorer reserve or compensation

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素

options.zh: 显示病人正在失去代偿余地的趋势
options.en: A trend showing the patient is losing reserve

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment
options.en: Skip reassessment once an initial impression has been formed

options.zh: 选择在病人安全标准下仍站得住脚的答案
options.en: Pick the answer that remains defendable when judged by patient safety

questions.explanationEn: This item is written to feel closer to a real entry-to-practice written exam stem. options.en: Choose the most advanced-sounding option even if it is not the safest PCP answer

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

questions.explanationZh: 这题被改成更接近真实 entry-to-practice written exam 题干的风格。正确答案之所以正确，是因为它把注意力放在这个病例里的主要威胁、病人趋势和最安全的 PCP 级判断上，同时避开了常见考试陷阱：拖延、被干扰项带走，以及虚假安心。

questions.questionEn: Two patients may both appear concerning, but for a 19-year-old patient who is wheezing with rising anxiety and a slower response to questions, which clue best points to the more dangerous presentation?
questions.questionZh: 两个病人都可能看起来令人担忧，但对于一名 19 岁、喘鸣加重、焦虑上升，回答问题变慢的病人，哪条线索最能指向更危险的表现？

options.zh: 因为某一个征象看起来安心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

options.zh: 临床意义比夸张但次要细节更大的发现
options.en: The finding that matters clinically more than a dramatic but less important detail

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素
options.en: Undervalue communication, documentation, or scene factors even when risk is changing

options.zh: 避开花哨选项，选择最安全的 PCP 级反应
options.en: Avoid the flashy option and select the safest PCP-level response

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素

options.zh: 即使风险在变化，也低估沟通、记录或现场因素

options.zh: 显示代偿正在被侵蚀的趋势
options.en: The trend that shows compensation is eroding

options.zh: 一旦形成初步印象就跳过 reassessment

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁

options.zh: 选择听起来最高级、但不一定最安全的 PCP 答案

questions.questionEn: A PCP is assessing a 31-year-old patient who is whose appearance is not dramatic but whose circulation is deteriorating. What is the best immediate priority?
questions.questionZh: PCP 正在评估一名 31 岁、外观看起来不算夸张，但循环正在恶化的病人。当前最好的立即优先处理是什么？

options.zh: 先处理较不紧急的细节，而不是主要威胁
options.en: Focus on a less urgent detail before addressing the main threat

options.zh: 因为某一个征象看起来安心就假设病人稳定
options.en: Assume the patient is stable because one sign looks reassuring

options.zh: 基于不稳定程度而不是外观单独判断的 PCP 级优先处理
options.en: Use PCP-level priorities based on instability, not appearance alone

options.zh: 等到诊断完全确定后再行动
options.en: Delay action until the diagnosis is fully certain
